compatible_fixture_commits.scope: qbitd-generated P2MR spend and boundary fixtures
compatible_fixture_commits.reason: These fixtures were generated before the testnet4 reset and AuxPoW chain-id change. P2MR address, witness, stack-boundary, WSF=1, and qbitd mempool/RPC semantics used by these fixtures are unchanged at the current contract ref; regenerate before changing any P2MR policy expectations.

refresh_policy.diff_policy: Any diff must update the qbit codec tests and explain the new byte-format coverage.

fixtures.notes: Synthetic parser fixture; not a consensus-valid spend.
